notes: v1.14.99 - Move roadmap Step 5: Profile reachable in the New UI. The legacy header overflow 'SITE PROFILE' item is hidden under body.rd and the rung-A 'SET UP SITE' NBA disappears once the profile is set, so a configured profile was unreachable/uneditable in redesign. Fix: the Command Center 'Profile' status pill is now a persistent, tappable path to the site-profile editor (firstRun_openProfile -> master profile section; frame-safe via the v1.14.97 nav_restore guard). cc-statusrow pill builder gains an optional onclick on the 3rd (Profile) slot; redesign-only (pg-cmd). Legacy NOW/overflow/profile editor untouched; ?redesign=0 byte-identical.
